data.body:
Pre-merge gate CLEARED (PR #738). Audited dev via ecs-rails-runner (`rails runner`): `exemption_application_forms` total=1693, `certification_case_id IS NULL` count=0. The refactor's new unconditional `certification_case_id` presence validation on ExemptionApplicationForm will not newly fail any existing row on update, so it stands as-is (no need to scope to `on: :create`). PR #738 now MERGEABLE + 12/12 CI green + data gate cleared; only remaining blocker is reviewer approval.

Note: ecs-rails-runner's terraform init failed first on local provider-lock drift (gitignored .terraform.lock.hcl at aws 6.50.0 vs committed constraint ~> 6.52.0); fixed locally with `terraform init -upgrade` in infra/reporting-app/service. Lock is gitignored, no tracked change.
